scripts.lint: biome check packages docs package.json turbo.json tsconfig.json biome.jsonc
scripts.format: biome check --write --unsafe packages docs package.json turbo.json tsconfig.json biome.jsonc
scripts.check: bun run lint && turbo run typecheck test test:integration test:conversion
scripts.check:full:parallel: bun run lint && turbo run typecheck test test:integration test:conversion test:stress:s1-s8-s9 test:stress:s2 test:stress:s4 test:stress:s5-s6 test:fuzz test:e2e --concurrency=100% --output-logs=errors-only
